mapper.select: select /* @SQLID=FCT008#SQL001 */ * from ( select C_TARGET_DATE from M_CALENDAR where C_CALENDAR_ID = 'T003' and IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') <= C_TARGET_DATE and C_BUS_NONBUS_DIV = '2' and C_DELETE_FLG = '0' order by C_TARGET_DATE ) where rownum <=16
select /* @SQLID=FCT008#SQL002 */ IPM_SE_INVESTMENTS_CODE from I_PRODUCT_MASTER where IPM_PRODUCT_FLAG = '0' and substr(IPM_PRODUCT_CODE,1,5) = #{brandCode} and IPM_PRI_EX_FLAG = '1'

select /* @SQLID=FCT008#SQL003 */ NAME AS overTime from M_CODE where CODE_TYPE = '57'
AND CODE_1 = #{req.periodTargetMarket}
AND CODE_2 = TRIM(#{req.ipmSeInvestmentsCode})
AND CODE_2 = 'DMY'
